products.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
products.description:
Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

Features:

  • Active Noise Cancellation (ANC)
  • 30-hour battery life
  • Bluetooth 5.0
  • Built-in microphone for calls
  • Foldable design with carrying case
products.short_description: Premium wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life.

products.name: Smart Fitness Tracker
products.description:
Track your health and fitness goals with this advanced fitness tracker. Monitor heart rate, sleep, steps, and more.

Features:

  • Heart rate monitoring
  • Sleep tracking
  • Step counter and distance
  • Calorie tracking
  • 7-day battery life
  • Water resistant (IP68)
products.short_description: Track your health and fitness goals with advanced monitoring features.

products.name: Organic Coffee Beans - Single Origin
products.description:
Premium single-origin organic coffee beans from Colombia. Medium roast with notes of chocolate and caramel.

Details:

  • 100% Arabica beans
  • USDA Organic certified
  • Fair Trade
  • Roasted fresh weekly
  • 1lb bag
products.short_description: Premium single-origin organic coffee beans with rich flavor.

products.name: Premium Yoga Mat
products.description:
Non-slip eco-friendly yoga mat made from natural rubber. Perfect for all types of yoga and fitness exercises.

Features:

  • 6mm thickness for comfort
  • Non-slip surface
  • Eco-friendly materials
  • 72" x 24" size
  • Comes with carrying strap
products.short_description: Non-slip eco-friendly yoga mat for comfort and stability.

products.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
products.description:
Double-walled insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours.

Features:

  • 750ml capacity
  • BPA-free
  • Leak-proof lid
  • Fits in car cup holders
  • Easy to clean
products.short_description: Insulated 750ml water bottle keeps drinks cold or hot.

products.name: Professional Running Shoes
products.description:
Professional-grade running shoes designed for athletes. Lightweight with superior cushioning and support.

Features:

  • Breathable mesh upper
  • Responsive cushioning
  • Durable rubber outsole
  • Arch support
  • Reflective details
products.short_description: Professional running shoes for athletes with superior comfort.

products.name: Whey Protein Powder - Vanilla
products.description:
High-quality whey protein powder for muscle recovery and growth. Delicious vanilla flavor.

Details:

  • 25g protein per serving
  • Low in sugar and carbs
  • 30 servings per container
  • Mixes easily
  • No artificial flavors
products.short_description: High-quality whey protein powder with 25g protein per serving.

products.name: Laptop Backpack with USB Port
products.description:
Durable laptop backpack with padded compartment, USB charging port, and multiple pockets.

Features:

  • Fits laptops up to 17 inches
  • USB charging port
  • Water-resistant material
  • Padded shoulder straps
  • Multiple compartments
products.short_description: Durable backpack with laptop compartment and USB charging port.

products.name: Ergonomic Wireless Mouse
products.description:
Ergonomic wireless mouse designed to reduce wrist strain. Perfect for long hours of work.

Features:

  • 2.4GHz wireless connection
  • Ergonomic design
  • Adjustable DPI (800-2400)
  • Long battery life
  • Works on most surfaces
products.short_description: Ergonomic wireless mouse for comfortable all-day use.

products.name: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging
products.description:
Adjustable LED desk lamp with multiple brightness levels and USB charging port. Energy-efficient and eye-friendly.

Features:

  • 5 brightness levels
  • 3 color temperatures
  • USB charging port
  • Touch controls
  • Adjustable arm and head
  • Energy-efficient LED
products.short_description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with USB charging and multiple settings.
